| [US](#us){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="United States"} [2d]{.tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="bidimensional"} units | [cz&sup2;](#cz2){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="square centizem"} | [cm&sup2;](#cm2){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="square centimeter"} |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [0.9688]{.colorSqIn} [sq. inches](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Square_inch)                                                                           | [39.0625]{.mono}                                                                       | [6.25]{.mono}                                                                            |
| [0.9688]{.colorSqIn} [sq. feet](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Square_foot)                                                                             | [5625]{.mono}                                                                          | [900]{.mono}                                                                             |
| [0.9688]{.colorSqIn} [sq. yards](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Square_yard)                                                                            | [50625]{.mono}                                                                         | [8100]{.mono}                                                                            |
| [0.9884]{.colorSqMi} [sq. miles](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Square_mile)                                                                            | [16 &times; 10^10^]{.mono}                                                             | [256 &times; 10^8^]{.mono}                                                               |
